post.description:
Chat endpoint - LangGraph integration.

Frontend sends:
{
    "message": "What products do you have?",
    "session_id": "user123",
    "shop_id": "your_shop_id"
}

Returns:
{
    "response": "Here are our products...",
    "intent": "product_list",
    "active_product": null,
    "session_id": "user123",
    "confidence": 0.95,
    "steps": [...]
}

get.description: Check if chat service is ready.

schema.title: Response Chat Health Api Chat Health Get

get.description: DEBUG ONLY: List all shops in database (for troubleshooting).

schema.title: Response Debug All Shops Api Shops Public Debug Get

get.description:
Public endpoint for chat bot to fetch shop details and products.
No authentication required.

schema.title: Response Get Shop Products Public Api Shops  Shop Id  Products Public Get
Response List Shops Api Shops Get
Response Get My Shops Api Shops Me Get

post.description: Create a product in a shop (public endpoint for testing).

get.description: List all products for a shop (public endpoint).

schema.title: Response List Categories Api Shops  Shop Id  Categories Get

post.description: Create a customer order via the public chatbot endpoint (LangGraph format).

schema.title: Response Create Public Order Api Shops  Shop Id  Orders Public Post
Response Get Orders By Session Api Orders Session  Session Id  Get
